steps.title: Find the linear rate
steps.content: From 1993 to 2013 (20 years), the population goes from 52 to 219 thousand. The slope is $$m=\frac{219-52}{2013-1993}=\frac{167}{20}=8.35 \text{ thousand/year}.$$

steps.title: Predict the requested value
steps.content: From 2013 to 2017 is 4 years, so add $8.35\cdot 4=33.4$ thousand to the 2013 value: $$x=219+33.4=252.4 \approx 252.$$ The answer is 252.
